title: VAT Refund Verification Manual
text:
## Purpose
This manual describes the minimum review steps for VAT refund claims selected for manual verification.

## Required Evidence
Inspectors should confirm invoices, payment proof, supplier identity, and a transaction trail consistent with the claimed input VAT.

## Decision Rules
Approve only when the evidentiary package is complete and internally consistent. Request clarification when the trail is incomplete but potentially curable.

## Recording Outcome
The final decision note must reference the reviewed evidence set, the applicable tax period, and the reason for approval or denial.
